name: Asparagus
recipeInstructions: Asparagus is low-calorie and spiked with vitamins A & C. Allow about to Prepare: Break off tough ends as far down as the stalks snap easily. For spears, tie them with string or cut each stalk into 1-inch pieces. Cooking Spears: In a deep, narrow pan or asparagus pot, bring 1 inch of salted water to boiling. Place asparagus upright in the pot. Boil until tender, about 2-3 minutes, then reduce heat and boil uncovered for an additional 5 minutes. Drain well. Cooking Pieces: Cook lower stalk pieces uncovered in 1 inch of boiling water for 6 minutes. Add tips, cover, and cook until tender, about 1-2 minutes. Drain. Steaming: Place a steamer or basket in a pot with 1/2 inch of boiling water (water should not touch the basket). Place asparagus in the basket, cover tightly, and steam until tender, about 6 minutes. Microwave: Cover and microwave spears or pieces (1 inch) with 1/4 cup water in a 2-quart casserole on high for 4 minutes. Turn asparagus over, cover, and microwave until tender-crisp, about 3 more minutes. Let stand 1 minute before draining.
